Vista Weather
Home

Privacy Policy

Privacy Policy

Vista Weather is designed to collect as little data as possible. Your data is never sold to advertisers or third parties. Your location is only used to fetch the forecast.

Never sold

We do not sell, rent, or trade your personal data.

Forecast only

Location is used only to show weather for your area.

No tracking

We do not track you across other companies' apps or websites.

Effective date: May 20, 2026

Scope

This policy explains how Vista Weather handles information in the Vista Weather mobile app and on the Vista Weather website.

Information We Collect

We collect only the information needed to provide the app and respond to requests you make.

  • Location. If you allow location access, Vista Weather uses your device's location to request the forecast for your area. We do not keep a history of your location.
  • Searches and saved places. If you search for or save a place in the app, that place may be used to show its forecast. Saved places are stored on your device.
  • Email address. If you join the waitlist or contact support, we collect the email address and message you provide so we can send the requested update or respond to you.

How We Use Information

  • To fetch and display weather forecasts.
  • To remember places you choose to save on your device.
  • To send launch or product updates you requested.
  • To respond to support, privacy, or deletion requests.

Location

Location access is optional and controlled by iOS. If you grant permission, Vista Weather may send your current location or an approximate location to a weather service provider only as needed to return the forecast. Your location is not used for advertising, sold to anyone, or used to build a profile about you.

Third-Party Services

We use weather data providers to operate Vista Weather. These providers may process data only to provide their services to us, and they must protect user data at least as carefully as this policy requires.

We do not use third-party advertising SDKs, data brokers, or tracking services.

Retention and Deletion

Location used to fetch a forecast is not retained by Vista Weather after the forecast request is served. Saved places and cached app data are stored on your device and can be removed by deleting them in the app, where available, or by deleting the app.

Waitlist and support emails are kept only as long as needed to send requested updates, provide support, meet legal obligations, or maintain basic business records. You can request deletion of your email or support messages at any time.

Your Choices

  • You can grant, deny, or revoke location permission in iOS Settings under Privacy & Security, then Location Services, then Vista Weather.

Children's Privacy

Vista Weather is not directed to children under 13, and we do not collect personal information from children under 13.

Security

We use reasonable administrative, technical, and organizational safeguards to protect personal data. No method of transmission or storage is completely secure, but we design Vista Weather to minimize the data we handle.

Changes

We may update this policy as Vista Weather changes. If we make material changes, we will update the effective date and provide additional notice when appropriate.

Contact

For privacy questions or deletion requests, email linguico.app@gmail.com.

Vista Weather © 2026
